deals.title: ASUS ROG Zephyrus G14 — 14" OLED 3K 120Hz, Ryzen AI 9, RTX 5070 Ti, 32GB RAM (Open Box)
deals.description: The ASUS ROG Zephyrus G14 is one of the most powerful thin-and-light gaming laptops ever made. This Open Box unit features a jaw-dropping 14" 3K OLED display running at 120Hz — perfect for competitive gaming and professional content creation. Powered by AMD's flagship Ryzen AI 9 HX processor and NVIDIA's RTX 5070 Ti GPU (12GB GDDR7), it tears through AAA titles and creative workloads alike. 32GB LPDDR5X RAM and a 1TB PCIe 4.0 NVMe SSD keep things fast. Open Box condition means it passed Best Buy's full inspection — all functions verified, original accessories included.

specs.CPU: AMD Ryzen AI 9 HX 370 (12-core, up to 5.1GHz)
specs.Condition: Open Box — Inspected & Verified by Best Buy

deals.title: Razer BlackShark V2 Pro Wireless PlayStation Gaming Headset — White
deals.description: The Razer BlackShark V2 Pro is widely considered one of the best wireless gaming headsets money can buy — and right now it's 56% off at Amazon. Features Razer's TriForce Titanium 50mm drivers, HyperClear Supercardioid mic, and SmartSwitch Dual Wireless (2.4GHz + Bluetooth 5.2). Up to 70 hours of battery life. All-time low price.

deals.title: 49" MSI MPG 491CQPX QD-OLED 1440p 240Hz Curved Ultrawide Gaming Monitor
deals.description: The MSI MPG 491CQPX is a 49" super-ultrawide QD-OLED that replaces two 27" monitors. Infinite contrast, 240Hz, 0.03ms GtG, 1000R curve, and AMD FreeSync Premium Pro + NVIDIA G-SYNC Compatible. Best price ever recorded for this model.

deals.title: Apple Watch SE 2 40mm GPS Smart Watch with Sport Band (Open Box)
deals.description: The Apple Watch SE 2 packs the S8 chip, crash detection, Emergency SOS via satellite, and swimproof design at a fraction of Series 8 pricing. This open box eBay unit at $101 is $148 off retail — minimal cosmetic wear, full functionality, backed by seller's return policy.

specs.Condition: Open Box — functional, minor cosmetic wear

deals.title: NZXT Kraken Elite 240 (2024) AIO Liquid Cooler — 2.72" LCD, AM5/LGA1851
deals.description: The NZXT Kraken Elite 240 features a 2.72" IPS LCD on the pump head (display temps, stats, or custom GIFs), improved cold plate, and supports AMD AM5 and Intel LGA1851 out of the box. NZXT CAM software is free with no subscription. Lowest-ever price.

deals.title: JAMJAKE Stylus Pen for Apple iPad (2018–2025) — Palm Rejection, Tilt Support
deals.description: At $5.99, the JAMJAKE Stylus is an almost no-brainer. Palm rejection, tilt sensitivity, magnetic side-attach charging, and no Bluetooth pairing needed. Works with all iPads from 2018–2025. 70% off — all-time low.

deals.title: Dell XPS 15 9530 — 15.6" OLED Touch, Core i9-13900H, RTX 4070, 32GB RAM
deals.description: Dell's flagship XPS 15 9530 combines a gorgeous 15.6" 3.5K OLED touchscreen with Intel Core i9-13900H and NVIDIA RTX 4070 8GB for elite performance in a slim chassis. 32GB DDR5 RAM, 1TB SSD. At $1,199 this is one of the best premium laptop deals you'll find.

deals.title: HP Spectre x360 14 — 2-in-1 14" OLED, Core Ultra 7, 32GB RAM, 1TB SSD
deals.description: HP's Spectre x360 14 is a top-tier 2-in-1 laptop with a stunning 2.8K OLED display, Intel Core Ultra 7 processor, and 32GB LPDDR5x RAM. Pen included. At $849 this is 35% off retail — an exceptional value for a premium convertible.

deals.title: Lenovo ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 12 — 14" IPS, Core Ultra 7, 32GB RAM, 1TB SSD
deals.description: The ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 12 is the gold standard for business ultrabooks — featherlight at 2.48 lbs, MIL-SPEC 810H durability tested, and powered by Intel Core Ultra 7 with 32GB RAM. Direct from Lenovo with full warranty. 39% off is rare for this model.

deals.title: Apple MacBook Air 15" (M3) — 8-Core CPU, 10-Core GPU, 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD
deals.description: The MacBook Air 15" M3 is Apple's best value laptop — a massive 15.3" Liquid Retina display in a fanless, all-day-battery chassis. The M3 chip beats most Intel Core i7 laptops in benchmarks while running whisper-quiet. At $1,049 this is $250 off retail.

deals.title: Acer Predator Helios Neo 16 — 16" QHD 165Hz, Core i7-14650HX, RTX 4070, 16GB
deals.description: The Helios Neo 16 packs a 16" QHD 165Hz IPS display, Intel Core i7-14650HX, and NVIDIA RTX 4070 8GB into one of the most affordable high-end gaming laptops right now. 16GB DDR5, 1TB SSD. At $699, a ridiculous price for RTX 4070 gaming performance.

deals.title: ASUS VivoBook 16X — 16" 3.2K OLED, Core Ultra 9, 32GB RAM, 1TB SSD
deals.description: The ASUS VivoBook 16X delivers a brilliant 16" 3.2K 120Hz OLED display and Intel Core Ultra 9 CPU at a shockingly affordable $749. 32GB RAM and 1TB SSD round out a versatile laptop that's great for creators and students alike.

deals.title: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Noise-Canceling Headphones — Black
deals.description: The Sony WH-1000XM5 tops every best-headphone chart for a reason — industry-leading noise cancellation, 30-hour battery, multipoint Bluetooth, and best-in-class call quality via 4 beamforming mics. At $248 this is one of the lowest prices ever on the XM5.

deals.title: Apple AirPods Pro 2 (USB-C) — Active Noise Cancellation, Adaptive Audio
deals.description: AirPods Pro 2 with USB-C now at $169 — best price ever on Amazon. Features Apple's H2 chip, Adaptive Audio (blends ANC and Transparency), Personalized Spatial Audio, and Conversation Awareness. Up to 6 hrs ANC listening, 30 hrs total with case.

specs.Case Charging: USB-C + MagSafe + Qi2 + Apple Watch charger

deals.title: JBL Charge 5 Portable Bluetooth Speaker — IP67 Waterproof, 20-Hr Battery
deals.description: The JBL Charge 5 is the king of portable Bluetooth speakers — IP67 waterproof, 20-hour battery, USB-A charging bank, and powerful full-range sound with a separate tweeter. 50% off at Best Buy, which is a significant sale on this perennial top pick.

specs.Charge Port: USB-C in, USB-A power bank out

deals.title: Sennheiser HD 560S Open-Back Over-Ear Audiophile Headphones
deals.description: The Sennheiser HD 560S offers a genuinely audiophile-grade open-back listening experience at a budget-friendly price. Neutral, reference-quality sound signature loved by music producers and audiophiles. Wired, 120 Ohm, works great with most headphone amps and USB DACs.

deals.title: Anker Soundcore Liberty 4 NC True Wireless Earbuds — 98.5% Noise Reduction
deals.description: At $49.99, the Soundcore Liberty 4 NC delivers 98.5% noise reduction, Hi-Res Audio Wireless (LDAC), 10 hours ANC battery (50 hrs total), and ACAA 2.0 coaxial dual drivers. Best-in-class value for noise-canceling earbuds under $100.

deals.title: LG 27GP850-B 27" Ultragear QHD IPS 180Hz 1ms — G-SYNC Compatible
deals.description: The LG 27GP850-B is consistently ranked the best all-around 1440p gaming monitor. Nano IPS panel, 180Hz, 1ms GtG, wide color gamut, and G-SYNC Compatible. A superb upgrade from 1080p for competitive and single-player gaming alike.

deals.title: Samsung Odyssey G5 34" Curved Ultrawide QHD 165Hz VA Monitor
deals.description: The Samsung Odyssey G5 34" ultrawide gives you the immersive 21:9 experience without breaking the bank. 3440x1440 resolution, 165Hz, 1000R curve, and AMD FreeSync Premium. At $299 this is close to an all-time low for this popular gaming monitor.

deals.title: Dell S2722QC 27" 4K UHD USB-C Monitor — 60Hz, IPS, Built-in Speakers
deals.description: The Dell S2722QC offers 4K IPS clarity with a single USB-C cable that delivers video + 90W laptop charging — perfect for clean desk setups. Built-in 3W x2 speakers. Ideal for productivity, content consumption, and light creative work.

deals.title: BenQ EW2880U 28" 4K IPS HDR10 Monitor — USB-C, Eye-Care, Built-in Speakers
deals.description: BenQ's EW2880U is a 28" 4K IPS monitor with a warm-toned HDR10 experience, B.I.+ sensor that auto-adjusts brightness based on ambient lighting, and 5W x2 treVolo speakers. USB-C with 60W PD. Great for home office and multimedia use.

specs.Eye-Care: Flicker-Free, Low Blue Light, B.I.+ sensor

deals.title: PlayStation 5 Slim Disc Edition Console Bundle — God of War Ragnarök
deals.description: The PS5 Slim is 30% smaller and lighter than the original, with the same blazing SSD speeds and 4K gaming performance. This bundle includes a full copy of God of War Ragnarök — an $80 value. At $429 this is the best PS5 bundle price available right now.

deals.title: Xbox Series X 1TB Console — 4K 120fps, 12 TFLOPS, Xbox Game Pass Ready
deals.description: The Xbox Series X at $399 is a rare 20% discount on Microsoft's flagship console. 12 teraflops of GPU performance, Quick Resume for up to 6 games simultaneously, and 4K 120fps capability. The best platform for Xbox Game Pass Ultimate subscribers.

deals.title: Nintendo Switch OLED Model — White, 64GB, 7" Vivid OLED Display
deals.description: The Nintendo Switch OLED upgrades the display to a stunning 7" OLED panel with vivid colors and deep blacks, adds a wide adjustable stand, 64GB internal storage, and enhanced audio. At $279 this is the lowest price we've tracked on the OLED model.

deals.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless — Adjustable OmniPoint 2.0 Switches
deals.description: The Apex Pro TKL Wireless is arguably the most advanced gaming keyboard ever made. The OmniPoint 2.0 magnetic switches let you set actuation from 0.1mm to 4.0mm per key. Bluetooth + 2.4GHz wireless, 40 hr battery, RGB per-key backlighting, and OLED Smart Display.

deals.title: Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 Wireless Gaming Mouse — 32,000 DPI HERO 2
deals.description: The world's lightest wireless gaming mouse at 60g. The G Pro X Superlight 2 is used by more pro esports players than any other mouse, featuring the HERO 2 sensor (32,000 DPI, zero smoothing/filtering/acceleration) and LIGHTSPEED 2.4GHz with 95-hour battery.

deals.title: Corsair K70 RGB PRO Mechanical Gaming Keyboard — Cherry MX Red, PBT Keycaps
deals.description: The K70 RGB PRO is Corsair's best full-size wired mechanical keyboard — Cherry MX Red switches for fast, smooth linear actuation, per-key RGB lighting, doubleshot PBT keycaps, dedicated media controls, and aluminum frame. At $69.99, an incredible value.

deals.title: Samsung Galaxy S24 128GB — Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, 6.2" AMOLED, Galaxy AI
deals.description: The Samsung Galaxy S24 is Samsung's flagship compact phone — Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, 6.2" 120Hz AMOLED, 7 years of OS updates, and Galaxy AI features like Live Translate, Circle to Search, and Generative Edit. Unlocked, works with all major carriers.

deals.title: Google Pixel 8a 128GB — Tensor G3, 6.1" OLED 120Hz, 7 Years Updates, Unlocked
deals.description: The Google Pixel 8a is the best camera phone under $500 — the 64MP main camera with Google's computational photography magic produces stunning photos and video. Tensor G3 chip, 7 years of OS + security updates, and AI features like Magic Eraser and Best Take.

deals.title: Apple iPad Air 11" M2 128GB Wi-Fi — 2024, Liquid Retina, USB-C
deals.description: The iPad Air M2 11" is one of the best tablets you can buy — M2 chip that outperforms most Intel laptops, a stunning Liquid Retina display, Apple Pencil Pro support, and USB-C with accessory compatibility. At $499 this is $100 off retail.

deals.title: Samsung Galaxy Tab S9 FE 10.9" 128GB — Exynos 1380, S Pen Included
deals.description: Samsung's Galaxy Tab S9 FE includes the S Pen stylus in the box — that alone justifies the price. 10.9" 90Hz LCD, 8GB RAM, 128GB storage, IP68 water resistance. At $299 with S Pen included, this is a fantastic value for a versatile Android tablet.

deals.title: OnePlus 12 5G 256GB — Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, 6.82" LTPO4 AMOLED, 100W Charging
deals.description: The OnePlus 12 is a flagship killer — Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, Hasselblad-tuned triple cameras, a stunning 6.82" 1–120Hz LTPO AMOLED display, and industry-leading 100W SuperVOOC wired charging (0–100% in 26 mins). 50W wireless too. Ridiculous value at $599.

deals.title: Amazon Echo Show 8 (3rd Gen) — 8" HD Touchscreen Smart Display, Spatial Audio
deals.description: The Echo Show 8 (3rd Gen) adds spatial audio and an upgraded 13MP auto-framing camera for video calls. Control your smart home, stream video/music, video call friends and family, or use it as a digital photo frame. At $89.99 this is a go-to smart display pick.

specs.Speaker: 2" x2 stereo with spatial audio
specs.Privacy: Physical camera shutter + mic off button

deals.title: Google Nest Hub Max 10" Smart Display — Google Assistant, Camera, Nest Cam
deals.description: The Nest Hub Max is Google's flagship smart display — 10" HD screen, 6.5W stereo speakers, and a built-in Nest Cam with face recognition that can detect when you approach and show you relevant info. Full Google Assistant + YouTube + Google Photos integration.

deals.title: Ring Video Doorbell 4 — 1080p HDR, Color Pre-Roll, Two-Way Talk, Hardwired/Battery
deals.description: The Ring Video Doorbell 4 adds Color Pre-Roll — so you see what happened 4 seconds before motion was detected, in color. 1080p HDR video, 160° field of view, dual-band Wi-Fi, and works wired or battery. At $79.99, nearly half off.

deals.title: Philips Hue White & Color Ambiance 4-Pack A19 Bulbs + Hue Bridge
deals.description: The Philips Hue starter kit with 4 full-color A19 bulbs and the Hue Bridge is the easiest way to build a smart lighting ecosystem. 16 million colors, 50,000 shades of white, syncs with TV and music, and works with Alexa, Google, Apple HomeKit. Outstanding 45% discount.

deals.title: eufy RoboVac G30 Hybrid — 2000Pa Suction, Smart Dynamic Navigation, Wi-Fi
deals.description: The eufy RoboVac G30 Hybrid vacuums and mops simultaneously, with 2000Pa suction and smart dynamic navigation that maps your home for efficient coverage. Wi-Fi + app control, works with Alexa and Google. 44% off at Amazon.

deals.title: TCL 65" S5 4-Series QLED 4K Smart TV — Google TV, HDR Pro, Dolby Vision
deals.description: TCL's 65" S5 QLED delivers vivid quantum dot colors with Dolby Vision, HDR10+, and HLG support on Google TV. Voice control via built-in Alexa and Google Assistant. At $429 this is the best 65" 4K TV deal we've seen this week.

deals.title: Hisense 55" U7K 4K Mini-LED ULED Smart TV — Google TV, 144Hz, Dolby Vision
deals.description: The Hisense U7K brings Mini-LED backlighting with 1,000 local dimming zones for deep blacks and stunning HDR at a fraction of OLED prices. 144Hz native panel, Dolby Vision IQ, and Google TV. At $499 this is an unreal deal for a premium Mini-LED TV.

deals.title: LG 55" C3 Series OLED evo 4K Smart TV — 120Hz, G-SYNC, FreeSync, webOS 23
deals.description: The LG C3 OLED is the benchmark TV for picture quality — perfect blacks, infinite contrast, and 120Hz with G-SYNC and FreeSync Premium Pro make it the ultimate gaming TV too. α9 Gen6 AI processor, Dolby Vision, Dolby Atmos. At $999 this is 44% off retail.

specs.Gaming: 4K 120fps, G-SYNC Compatible, FreeSync Premium Pro, VRR, ALLM

deals.title: Samsung 65" QN90C Neo QLED 4K Smart TV — 144Hz, Tizen OS, Mini LED
deals.description: The Samsung QN90C Neo QLED features Mini LED with Quantum Matrix Technology Pro, delivering exceptional brightness and local dimming performance. 144Hz, 4x HDMI 2.1, Gaming Hub built-in, Neural Quantum Processor 4K. 45% off — significant savings on a premium panel.

deals.title: Vizio 75" V-Series 4K UHD Smart TV — Dolby HDR, Full Array Backlight, Apple AirPlay
deals.description: Vizio's 75" V-Series is the go-to for big-screen value. Full array backlight with local dimming, Dolby Vision HDR, Apple AirPlay 2, and Chromecast built-in — all for under $500. The best 75" TV deal right now.

deals.title: AMD Ryzen 9 7950X3D — 16-Core/32-Thread, 3D V-Cache, AM5 Socket
deals.description: The Ryzen 9 7950X3D is AMD's crown jewel — 16 cores, 32 threads, and 128MB of 3D V-Cache that makes it the fastest gaming + productivity CPU ever made. Benchmarks consistently beat Intel's best. At $449 this is a historic price for this chip.

deals.title: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 Super FE 12GB GDDR6X — DLSS 3.5, Ada Lovelace
deals.description: The RTX 4070 Super is the most popular high-end GPU right now — 7168 CUDA cores, DLSS 3.5 with Frame Generation, AV1 encoding, and stellar 1440p + solid 4K performance. At $489 this is among the best prices available on a new-in-box card.

deals.title: Corsair Vengeance 32GB (2x16GB) DDR5-6000 CL36 — AMD EXPO & Intel XMP 3.0
deals.description: 32GB DDR5-6000 at $79.99 is a killer deal — Corsair Vengeance with CL36 latency, AMD EXPO and Intel XMP 3.0 one-click overclocking support. Perfect for Ryzen 7000/9000 and Intel Core Ultra 200 builds. 43% off list price.

deals.title: Samsung 990 Pro 2TB NVMe SSD M.2 — 7,450 MB/s Read, PCIe 4.0, PS5 Compatible
deals.description: Samsung's 990 Pro is the fastest consumer PCIe 4.0 NVMe SSD available. 7,450 MB/s sequential read, 6,900 MB/s write, and Samsung's new controller architecture dramatically reduces power consumption. Works in PS5, desktop, and laptop. 39% off.

deals.title: ASUS ROG Strix B650E-F WiFi 6E ATX Motherboard — DDR5, PCIe 5.0, AM5
deals.description: The ROG Strix B650E-F WiFi is the sweet spot for Ryzen 7000/9000 builders — PCIe 5.0 x16 + PCIe 5.0 M.2, DDR5-6400+ OC support, Wi-Fi 6E, 2.5G LAN, and ASUS's robust 14+2 power stage VRM. 40% off is an outstanding deal on a premium AM5 board.

deals.title: Corsair RM850x 850W 80+ Gold ATX 3.0 Fully Modular PSU — 10-Year Warranty
deals.description: The Corsair RM850x is a perennial top pick for high-performance builds — 80+ Gold certified, fully modular, whisper-quiet fan (goes fanless at low loads), ATX 3.0 native PCIe 5.0 connector, and an industry-leading 10-year warranty. 38% off.

specs.Fan: 135mm fan (Zero RPM mode at low load)

deals.title: Garmin Forerunner 255 Music GPS Running Watch — Multi-Sport, HRV, Training Load
deals.description: The Garmin Forerunner 255 Music is the best GPS running watch under $300. Advanced running metrics (vertical oscillation, ground contact time), HRV Status, Training Readiness score, and 30-hour GPS battery life. Offline music storage for 500+ songs.

specs.Training Metrics: VO2 Max, Training Load, HRV Status, Recovery Time

deals.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch6 44mm — BioActive Sensor, Sleep Coaching, Galaxy AI
deals.description: The Galaxy Watch6 44mm is Samsung's best smartwatch for Android users. BioActive sensor tracks heart rate, ECG, SpO2, and body composition. Advanced Sleep Coaching, 40% thinner bezel than Watch5, and now 40% off at Best Buy.

specs.Sensors: BioActive (HR, ECG, SpO2, body composition), accelerometer, barometer, GPS

deals.title: Anker 140W 3-Port USB-C GaNPrime Wall Charger — Laptop + Phone + Earbuds
deals.description: Anker's 140W GaNPrime 3-port charger is one of the most versatile chargers on the market — charge a MacBook at 100W while also powering your phone and earbuds simultaneously, all from one wall plug. GaN technology keeps it compact and cool.

deals.title: Elgato Stream Deck MK.2 — 15 LCD Keys, Customizable, Works with OBS, Teams, Chrome
deals.description: The Elgato Stream Deck MK.2 is the ultimate productivity macro pad — 15 individually programmable LCD keys that can one-tap trigger OBS scenes, mute/unmute Teams calls, launch apps, or anything you can script. Used by millions of streamers and professionals.

specs.Compatibility: OBS, Twitch, YouTube, Zoom, Teams, Chrome, and more

deals.title: Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Productivity Mouse — 8000 DPI, Quiet Clicks
deals.description: The Logitech MX Master 3S is the gold standard for productivity mice — MagSpeed electromagnetic scroll wheel, 8,000 DPI sensor, ultra-quiet clicks, and Logi Bolt 2.4GHz wireless. Works on any surface including glass. Connect to 3 devices, switch with one button.

deals.title: Anker 10-in-1 USB-C Hub — 4K HDMI, 100W PD, SD Card, USB 3.0 x3, Ethernet
deals.description: Anker's 10-in-1 USB-C hub turns one USB-C port into a full workstation — 4K HDMI, 100W pass-through charging, SD/microSD card reader, gigabit Ethernet, and 3 USB 3.0 ports. Perfect for MacBook, iPad Pro, or any modern laptop.

specs.Ports: 4K HDMI, 100W USB-C PD, SD, microSD, 3x USB-A 3.0, Gigabit Ethernet, USB-C data

deals.title: SanDisk 1TB Extreme Portable SSD — 1050 MB/s, USB 3.2 Gen 2, IP55, Works with PS5
deals.description: The SanDisk Extreme 1TB portable SSD hits 1050 MB/s read — fast enough to edit 4K video directly from the drive. IP55 water/dust resistance, 2m drop protection, and works as expanded storage for PS5. 36% off at Amazon.

deals.title: Belkin BoostCharge Pro 3-in-1 MagSafe Charging Stand — iPhone + Watch + AirPods
deals.description: The Belkin BoostCharge Pro 3-in-1 wirelessly charges your iPhone at 15W MagSafe, Apple Watch at 5W, and AirPods simultaneously — all from a single cable and clean desk stand. Apple-certified (MFi + Made for MagSafe). A must-have Apple household charging hub.

specs.Compatibility: iPhone 12 and newer, all Apple Watch, AirPods with wireless case

deals.title: Keychron K2 Pro QMK/VIA Wireless Mechanical Keyboard — Gateron Red, Backlit
deals.description: The Keychron K2 Pro is a compact 75% wireless mechanical keyboard loved by Mac and Windows users alike. QMK/VIA open-source firmware for full key remapping, Gateron Pro Red switches, Bluetooth 5.1 (3 devices), and 2.4GHz wireless. RGB backlit, hot-swappable.

deals.title: Spigen Ultra Hybrid iPhone 16 Pro Max Case — Crystal Clear, MagSafe Compatible
deals.description: Spigen's Ultra Hybrid is the most popular clear case on Amazon — military-grade drop protection, crystal-clear back that shows off your iPhone's color, and full MagSafe compatibility. 40% off at $11.99 makes this an easy add-to-cart.

deals.title: Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed Wireless Gaming Mouse — 26,000 DPI, 64g
deals.description: The Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed is an ultra-lightweight wireless gaming mouse at 64g — featuring the Focus X 26K optical sensor, HyperSpeed 2.4GHz wireless, and up to 235 hours of battery. Ergonomic right-hand design loved by millions of gamers.

deals.title: be quiet! Dark Rock Pro 5 CPU Air Cooler — 250W TDP, Dual-Tower, Silent Wings 5
deals.description: The be quiet! Dark Rock Pro 5 is the king of air coolers — dual-tower design with 250W TDP, three Silent Wings 5 fans, and whisper-quiet operation even under full load. Outperforms many 280mm AIOs while being dead silent. Compatible with AM5 and LGA1851.
